data.value: SF Batch is empty
SF Batch is already used

Extract Batch characteristic is empty
There too many running orders (#%orderCount%) on Cell %cellId%
There is already a running procedure in the equipment

Produced quantity is zero

data.name: SABconsumedQuantityIsZero
data.value: Consumed quantity is zero. Do you want complete order?

data.name: SABMoreEntriesInDestinationEquipment
data.value: There are more running entries in the destination equipment. If you continue the data will be recorder only in POM. Do you want to continue?

data.name: SABMoreThenOneEntryInExecutionEquipment
data.value: There are too many running orders. Do you want continue?

data.name: SABNotEmptyCleanTankStatus
data.value: The execution equipment is not in "Empty Clean" status. Do you want to continue?

data.name: SABNotOkTankStatus
data.value: The execution equipment (%execEquipment%) is in '%status%' status but has to be in %allowedStatus%. Do you want to continue?

data.name: SABproducedQuantityIsEnough
data.value: Produced quantity is not + or - 10% of planned. Do you want complete order?

data.name: CompleteProcedureEndTimeOverwrite
data.value: Do you want to overwrite %kopList% with the new endTime?

data.name: SABRequiredFields
data.value: Please fill in all required fields (*)

data.name: SABWeekManagementNoShiftFound
data.value: No shift found for Year and Week selected: all data loaded.

data.name: SABInventoryManagementMandatorySourceEquipment
data.value: Please select Source equipment first (*)

data.name: SABInventoryManagementNOExternalIdFound
data.value: No external Id found for equipment

data.name: SABInventoryManagementNOExternalIdFoundWithBR
data.value: No external Id found for equipment

data.name: SABInventoryManagementUnrestrictedQty
data.value: Qty must be <= than equipment unrestricted qty [%unrestrictedQty%] (*)

data.name: SABPlanningManagementSelectRealResource
data.value: Please select proper vessel from list (^)

data.name: SABTeamManagementDateEquipmentMandatory
data.value: Select Date and Equipment to get the related Shifts

data.name: SABTeamManagementNoShiftFound
data.value: No shift found related to Date and Equipment selected.
There are too many running orders (%orderList%)

data.name: SABAskConfirmForTankStatusChangeNoOrder
data.value: There are no running orders on this equipment. Do you want to continue?

data.name: SABAskConfirmForTankStatusChangeOneOrder
data.value: There are Running Orders on this equipment. Do you want to continue?

data.value: Error: Create Filter Run failed

data.value: Error: End Time should be greater than Start Time

data.value: Update of the counter failed

data.value: Timestamp cannot be in the future

data.value: Quantity must be a positive value

data.value: Timestamp cannot be lower than the last inserted one

data.value: Change the quantity to 0 or confirm the quantity inside the tank

data.value: failed connection to OEE server

data.value: unknown error

data.value: operation failed

data.name: SABAbortOrderOK
data.value: Order %orderId% sucessfully aborted

data.name: SABKopUpdateNotOK
data.value: KOP %kopName% not updated

data.name: SABKopUpdateOK
data.value: KOP %kopName% successfully updated

data.name: SABMaxTimeRangeWarning
data.value: Selected time range exceed the maximum allowed of %max_time_range% hours.

data.name: SABNewOrderOK
data.value: Order %newOrderId% successfully created

data.name: SABProdDeclareAlreadyDone
data.value: Operation not allowed since a production declaration has already been done

data.name: SABProductDeclareIsFinal
data.value: Final declaration has already been done – further production declarations will fail in SAP

data.name: SABStandardSucces
data.value: Operation successfully completed

data.name: SABSynchOrderOK
data.value: Order %oDummy% successfully synchronized by %oReal% SAP order

data.name: SABInvalidFormatCalendar
data.value: Invalid Format
It's not possible to align the source tank %TANK-ID% with Material %MAT-ID%
System Error %ID%
There is another material (%materialId%) in the destination (%equipId%)

data.name: SABAnotherBatchForFL
data.value: There is another Batch (%batchId%) in the destination Tank (%sloc%)

data.name: SABMultipleBatchesForFL
data.value: There are multiple batches in the destination tank (%sloc%).

data.name: SABSapWebServiceError
data.value: The Batch & Stock interface (SAP Web service) is unavailable

data.name: SABOEEDTMErrorDelete
data.value: Writing operation (delete downtime) failed

data.name: SABOEEDTMErrorMerge
data.value: Writing operation (merge downtime) failed

data.name: SABOEEDTMErrorMultiOrder
data.value: Operation aborted: new downtime period affetcs two different orders

data.name: SABOEEDTMErrorSplit
data.value: Writing operation (split downtime) failed

data.name: SABOEEDTMErrorUpdate
data.value: Writing operation (update downtime) failed

data.name: SABOEEDTMNoRecordsFound
data.value: No downtime records found

data.value: Are you sure you want to confirm the merge down operation?

data.name: SABOEEMergeUpConfirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to confirm the merge up operation?

data.value: No equipment selected

data.value: End Time cannot be in the future

data.name: SABOEEUpdateConfirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to confirm the update operation?
Order is already started. Please click Refresh

data.name: SABMoreOrdersInDestinationEquipment
data.value: There are more running orders in the destination equipment. Please contact your system administrator.
Tank Quantity for Order = %ORD% was %QTY% and was not in the correct format, Message was not sent to INFOR
SABPPAKOP.insertKOPValue returned false for KopCode=%kopName%, equipFullPath=%tankFullPath%, value=%kopValue%
Datetime could not be set for KopCode=%kopName%, equipFullPath=%tankFullPath%, value=%kopValue%
Property to flag setting of Due-Date (DuedateUpdTFM) was not found for Order = %ORD%
No Procedure was found for Process Order %ORD%, message was not sent to INFOR
Only one Procedure was expected for Process Order %ORD% but more then 1 were found, message was not sent to INFOR
Equipment, Order and Procedure were not available. Message was not sent to Infor
Exception to manage tank (KOP-Status, etc.) for Order = %ORD_ID%, Procedure = %ENTRY%, KOP = %KOP%, Equipment = %EQUIP%. Exception was: %EX%
Equipment, Order and Procedure were not available. Cannot complete
Could not retrieve Running Order and Procedure from Equipment. Pls check that an order is running. Message was not sent to Infor
Update Tank Qty failed for Tank = %LOT_EQUIPMENT% because tank was not found in MM
Update Tank Qty failed for tank = %LOT_EQUIPMENT% with Exception = %EXCEPTION%
Could not start sending Batch Charact. msg to SAP for Order %ORDER%, Error from PM = %ERR%, Error-desc. = %ERRDSC%
was not possible to retrieve running order and procedure on Tank. Pls check that an order is running on Tank
was not possible to retrieve running order and procedure on Tank. Pls check that an order is running on Tank
ERROR: Message was not sent to INFOR.
No data found for Order = %ORD%, Message was not sent to INFOR
No First-level Entry data found for Order = %ORD%, Message was not sent to INFOR
No Procedure (Sub-Entry) data found for Order = %ORD%, Procedure = %SUB_ENTRY%, Message was not sent to INFOR
No Equipment data found for Order = %ORD%, Procedure = %SUB_ENTRY%, Equip.=%EQUIP%, Message was not sent to INFOR
Alcohol of Order = %ORD%, Procedure = %SUB_ENTRY% was %ALCOHOL% and was not in the correct format, Message was not sent to INFOR
End Outflow of Order = %ORD%, Procedure = %SUB_ENTRY% was %DATE% and was not in the correct format, Message was not sent to INFOR
Start Outflow of Order = %ORD%, Procedure = %SUB_ENTRY% was %DATE% and was not in the correct format, Message was not sent to INFOR
End Inflow of Order = %ORD%, Procedure = %SUB_ENTRY% was %DATE% and was not in the correct format, Message was not sent to INFOR

data.name: SABStartStepNoBBTRetrievedFromSAP
data.value: No compatible BBTs was retrieved from SAP. Do you want to continue?

data.name: SABOEECounterNoOrderSelected
data.value: Please select mandatory field Order ID

data.name: SABConfirmCropDilutionVol
data.value: The quantity in the tank (%tankName%) will be reduced by the value %declaredQty% HL - %OPFECROPDILUTIONVOL_Value% HL . Do you confirm?

data.name: SABNotAllowCropDilutionVol
data.value: Operation cannot be performed because declared quantity is less than dilution volume

data.name: SABCreateOrderFailureCategoryProperty
data.value: Error: Failure on setting 'Category' property!

data.name: SABCreateOrderFailureCommentProperty
data.value: Error: Failure on setting 'Comment' property!

data.name: ReverseDestOrderIsNotRunning
data.value: Operation not allowed. Consumed order (%orderId%) is not running

data.name: ErrorInBackflushProcedure
data.value: The backflush procedure finished with errors. Check if there are problems with the material consumptions.

data.name: UserMustFixErrorsAfterBackflush
data.value: There are unfixed errors in the material consumptions. Please resolve these errors before closing the order.

data.name: ReverseMaterialIsBackFlushedWithError
data.value: There are some BackFlush errors relative to the selected production declaration , please fix them and retry.

data.name: ReverseMaterialIsNotYetBackFlushed
data.value: The selected production declaration is not yet back flushed, please retry later.

data.name: SynchOrderNoMoreOkError
data.value: Order %orderId% is no more synchronizable

data.name: SendBacthMessageToShopFloor
data.value: Error while sending the message to shop floor.

data.name: checkCompleteDate
data.value: End time cannot be after order start and before now.

data.name: checkCompleteDateLessThenDeclarations
data.value: Some Production declaration have a date/time greater than the date/time inserted.
Error while trying to save the filter run order id in the order: %OrderID%. %Message%
There are too many running orders (%orderList%) in source equipment (%sourceEquip%)
There are too many running orders (%orderList%) in destination equipment (%sourceEquip%)

data.name: OrderAlreadyConfirmed
data.value: Order is already confirmed. Please click Refresh

data.name: CannotReopenOrder
data.value: You can not reopen an order closed more than %days% days ago
